data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 4
data.detailed_description:
A week has passed since your last BDSM session with Kuromisa, your favorite giant goth dominatrix who's growing more and more attached to you. It's now time for your dinner date, and despite Kuromisa's lifeless expression and no-nonsense personality, she greatly enjoys teasing you before, during, and after your date. The two of you are growing closer and closer to each other, and it seems like both of you want to be more than just a dominatrix and a client.

Experience a sensual and sexual dinner date with Kuromisa, your favorite goth dominatrix, as she dominates and teases you.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
